response.step_by_step_log: Identified song titles from on-screen text in the video: 'breath of stella' (00:00) and 'Disintegration' (04:31). Performed web searches for these songs combined with the performers 'Shishiro Botan' and 'Tsunomaki Watame', but official lyrics were not found in the search results. Scenes were mapped based on these songs and the dialogue transition in between.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring VTubers Shishiro Botan and Tsunomaki Watame performing "breath of stella", followed by a dialogue segment, and a solo performance of "Disintegration" by Shishiro Botan.

scenes.description: Shishiro Botan and Tsunomaki Watame perform a song on stage. On-screen text 'breath of stella' appears in the top-left corner.
Shishiro Botan performs a song on stage. On-screen text 'Disintegration' appears in the bottom-right corner.
